tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor Ring 2 verbatim files (configs + git-* scripts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring over byte-identical the new config files and the four git-* subcommands from hollow/dotfiles@main.

**Files:** Create bat/config, git/ignore, wgetrc, glow/glow.yml, glow/styles/catppuccin-mocha.json; create executable zsh/git-main-branch, zsh/git-latest, zsh/git-cleanup, zsh/git-checkout-latest.

**Acceptance Criteria:** 9 files byte-identical to hollow@main; git-* scripts executable (100755) + zsh -n clean; glow style valid JSON.

**Verify:** diff 9 files vs fresh hollow clone; zsh -n + test -x git-* scripts; json.load glow style.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bat/config","git/ignore","wgetrc","glow/glow.yml","glow/styles/catppuccin-mocha.json","zsh/git-main-branch","zsh/git-latest","zsh/git-cleanup","zsh/git-checkout-latest"], "verifyCommand": "diff vs fresh hollow clone; zsh -n + test -x; json.load glow style", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 files byte-identical","git-* executable + zsh -n","glow style valid JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend the Brewfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Ring 2 tools to the Brewfile, alphabetical and (except glow) a subset of upstream.

**Files:** Modify Brewfile.

**Acceptance Criteria:** adds bat, duf, eza, fd, glow, ripgrep alphabetically; brew bundle list --all parses; every entry in upstream except glow.

**Verify:** brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all; subset-vs-upstream check (glow excepted) -> SUBSET-OK.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "brew bundle list --all; subset check glow excepted", "acceptanceCriteria": ["adds bat/duf/eza/fd/glow/ripgrep","brew bundle list parses","subset of upstream except glow"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add Ring 2 blocks to zsh/.zshrc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert tool/nicety/git blocks into .zshrc at their original upstream relative position, keeping it a strict line-subset.

**Files:** Modify zsh/.zshrc (exact blocks in plan doc Task 3 Step 1).

**Acceptance Criteria:** 11 blocks inserted between `zi auto has"dscl" for brew` and `# starship:` in order; zsh -n exit 0; strict line-subset of upstream; git block has exactly the 14 aliases (no gcu/gdu/git-each/git-parallel).

**Verify:** zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo SYNTAX-OK; strict-line-subset check -> STRICT-SUBSET-OK.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n; strict-line-subset vs upstream .zshrc", "acceptanceCriteria": ["11 blocks in upstream order","zsh -n exit 0","strict line-subset","14 git aliases only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add git/config, git/local.example, git/.gitignore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Impersonal shared git defaults + alias block with [include] for per-user identity, a tracked identity template, and a per-dir gitignore.

**Files:** Create git/config, git/local.example, git/.gitignore.

**Acceptance Criteria:** git/config has upstream [alias]/[advice]/[branch]/[color]/[diff]/[init]/[pull]/[push]/[rerere] byte-identical, omits [user]/[gpg]/[commit]/[filter lfs], ends with tab-indented [include] path=local; every line in upstream except include lines; git config --list parses; git/local.example [user] name+email only; git/.gitignore = /local.

**Verify:** git config -f git/config --get include.path -> local; git/config subset check -> GITCONFIG-SUBSET-OK.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["git/config","git/local.example","git/.gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "git config -f git/config --get include.path; subset check include excepted", "acceptanceCriteria": ["impersonal subset + [include]","every line in upstream except include","git config --list parses","local.example name+email only","git/.gitignore = /local"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Seed git/local from install.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On first install, copy git/local.example -> git/local if absent.

**Files:** Modify install.sh.

**Acceptance Criteria:** seed step after the ~/.zshrc symlink and before `# 4. Hand off`; shellcheck -s sh clean; sh -n parses; idempotent (only when git/local absent).

**Verify:** shellcheck -s sh install.sh && sh -n install.sh && echo LINT-OK; grep -q 'git/local.example' install.sh.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["install.sh"], "verifyCommand": "shellcheck -s sh install.sh && sh -n install.sh && grep git/local.example", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seed step after symlink before hand-off","shellcheck clean + sh -n","idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Add "Set your git identity" to README.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document setting git identity in git/local, including the --global caveat.

**Files:** Modify README.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** `### Set your git identity` under `## Getting started`; tells user to edit ~/.config/git/local with name/email, mentions git config --file form, notes git prompts until set, warns against git config --global; single H1; no new markdownlint errors beyond pre-existing MD013 install line.

**Verify:** grep -q 'git/local' README.md && grep -q 'Set your git identity' README.md && echo README-OK.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep git/local + 'Set your git identity' in README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["### Set your git identity under Getting started","edit git/local + --file + prompt + --global warning","single H1, no new lint beyond MD013"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Faithfulness verification + extended smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove Ring 2 stays a faithful subset of hollow/dotfiles@main and record the extended manual smoke test.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in conversation. MUST NOT be closed by walking around it or substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** Create docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-zsh-dotfiles-ring2-smoketest.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** 9 vendored files byte-identical to upstream; zsh/.zshrc strict line-subset; every Brewfile entry upstream except glow; every git/config line upstream except the two [include] lines; zsh -n + shellcheck -s sh pass + glow JSON valid; smoke-test checklist file exists.

**Verify:** aggregate faithfulness suite (plan doc Task 7 Step 1) -> RING2-FAITHFUL-OK, no FAIL/DIFFERS/NOT-IN-UPSTREAM.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-zsh-dotfiles-ring2-smoketest.md"], "verifyCommand": "aggregate faithfulness suite vs fresh hollow clone -> RING2-FAITHFUL-OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 vendored files byte-identical","zshrc strict subset","Brewfile subset except glow","git/config subset except include","zsh -n + shellcheck pass + glow JSON valid","smoke-test checklist exists"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```
